summary: Comprehensive UI testing of AutoML Master client-side application. All 5 critical bug fixes verified working: (1) Predictions tab opens its own view without redirecting to Train, (2) Model persistence with setModels(prev => [...prev, newModel]) working, (3) Total Models dashboard metric shows actual count, (4) Trend indicators show N/A when value is 0, (5) Predictions page auto-uses latest model. Additionally tested regression training with visualizations and model library CRUD operations.

critical_code_review_comments: App is 100% client-side with no backend - good for simplicity but models are lost on page refresh
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for UI testing
Good separation of ML logic from UI components
seed_data_creation: Used sample datasets: Loan Approval (classification) and House Prices (regression)
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is fully client-side with no backend/MongoDB. All 5 critical bug fixes are working: (1) Predictions view opens without redirect, (2) Model persistence with proper state management, (3) Dashboard metrics accurate, (4) Trend N/A for zero values, (5) Auto-select latest model. Test using sample datasets provided in the UI.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - All bugs fixed and verified working
